description_long: This bungalow features a prominent L-shaped layout with a combination of solid and open-air sections. The main structure is topped with a dual-tone, sloped roof, while the extended wing is covered by a pergola-style roof with evenly spaced beams. The exterior walls are primarily constructed from brick and wood, with open railings and support columns adding to the architectural detail. A central staircase leads up to a covered porch area, which is surrounded by wooden balustrades. The overall design emphasizes natural materials and open, airy spaces, making it suitable for suburban or park-like urban environments.
description: An L-shaped bungalow with a dual-tone sloped roof, brick and wood construction, and a pergola-covered extension. Features a central staircase, open porch, and prominent wooden railings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance staircase, covered porch, and the transition between the solid roof and pergola extension.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the pergola extension and the solid brick base supporting the structure.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the L-shaped layout, open railings, and the full span of the pergola roof.
description_view_3: Top-down view emphasizing the dual-tone sloped roof and the linear arrangement of the pergola beams.
